Solana DEX surpasses Ethereum in transaction volume in one week
articles.description: Solana’s decentralized exchanges (DEXs) have achieved a notable milestone, surpassing Ethereum in transaction volume over the last week. According to Defi Llama data, the DEXs recorded a total volume of $9.03 billion, outpacing Ethereum’s $8.836 billion in the same period. This achievement is attributed to the blockchain’s surging DEX activity, largely fueled by lower gas […]

articles.description: Solana has had one of the best price journeys this year, increasing an outstanding 665% since January. articles.description: Since Monday, Solana (SOL) has rallied by over 45%, approaching the much-awaited $100 mark.
